artifact.description:
The hero section currently displays three distinct, vertically oriented cards against a solid black background. A search bar is located at the top left and "ALUZINA" text at the bottom center.

**Before State:**
The initial view shows three cards: "STATE MACHINES IN UI DE" (left), "ALUZINA OS" (center, prominent, on a pedestal), and "EL THE CHAMELEON" (right). These cards are horizontally arranged with partial overlap, presented statically on a dark, unadorned background.

**After State:**
Upon scroll, the solid black background transitions to a "heavenly background scene". The three cards will animate within this new background, indicating movement, repositioning, or visual transformation synchronized with the scroll interaction.

text:
Perfect! I've created your before and after images for the website hero section:

## 🎨 Before & After Hero Section

**BEFORE State** - Shows the initial static view with the three cards on the black background, exactly as users first see it.

**AFTER State** - Shows the animated state with a heavenly background featuring soft blue skies, fluffy clouds, and ethereal lighting. The cards appear to be floating and dynamically positioned, suggesting the scroll-triggered animation effect.

These images will help you visualize and communicate how the hero section will transform as users scroll through your website. The heavenly background creates a dreamy, elevated atmosphere that contrasts beautifully with the initial dark state, making the scroll animation feel magical and engaging.

```sug
<suggestion>
  <label>Add more animation states</label>
  <prompt>Create intermediate animation frames showing the transition between before and after states</prompt>
</suggestion>
<suggestion>
  <label>Different background style</label>
  <prompt>Try a different background theme like sunset, galaxy, or aurora for the after state</prompt>
</suggestion>
<suggestion>
  <label>Mobile version</label>
  <prompt>Create mobile responsive versions of these before and after states</prompt>
</suggestion>
```

The UI elements, cards, search bar, and ALUZINA text remain completely static and motionless. Only the clouds and mist are animated with smooth, looping motion. Heavenly, serene atmosphere with soft sunlight filtering through clouds. Cinematic quality, subtle and elegant movement.
